languages.text: "Нельзя терять время. Скверна, что угнездилась в этом месте, должна быть санирована как можно быстрее. В противном случае, я оцениваю риски инфицирования ею, как экстремально высокие. Поспешим же, Вольный Торговец".

"There is no time to lose. The corruption that has nested in this place must be sanitised as swiftly as possible. Otherwise, I evaluate the risks of its infection as extremely high. Let us hurry, Rogue Trader."
languages.original_text: "Нельзя терять время. Скверна, что угнездилась в этом месте, должна быть санирована как можно быстрее. В противном случае, я оцениваю риски инфицирования ею, как экстремально высокие. Поспешим же, Вольный Торговец".

traits.locale_text: "There is no time to lose. The corruption that has nested in this place must be sanitised as swiftly as possible. Otherwise, I evaluate the risks of its infection as extremely high. Let us hasten, Rogue Trader."

"There is no time to lose. The corruption that has nested in this place must be sanitised as swiftly as possible. Otherwise, I evaluate the risks of its infection as extremely high. Let us hasten, Rogue Trader."

"There is no time to lose. The corruption that has nested in this place must be sanitised as swiftly as possible. Otherwise, I evaluate the risks of its infection as extremely high. Let us hurry, Rogue Trader."

"There is no time to lose. The corruption that has nested in this place must be sanitised as swiftly as possible. Otherwise, I evaluate the risks of its infection as extremely high. Let us hurry, Rogue Trader."

languages.text: «No hay tiempo que perder. La corrupción que ha anidado en este lugar debe purificarse de inmediato. De no hacerlo, el riesgo de infección es extremadamente alto. Rápido, Comerciante».
languages.original_text: "There is no time to lose. The corruption that has nested in this place must be sanitised as swiftly as possible. Otherwise, I evaluate the risks of its infection as extremely high. Let us hurry, Rogue Trader."

traits.locale_text: «No hay tiempo que perder. La corrupción que ha anidado en este lugar debe purificarse de inmediato. De no hacerlo, el riesgo de infección es extremadamente alto. Rápido, Comerciante».

languages.text: “没有时间可浪费了。必须尽快清除盘踞在此地的腐化。否则，据我评估，感染扩散的风险极高。我们必须尽快行动，行商浪人。”
languages.original_text: "There is no time to lose. The corruption that has nested in this place must be sanitised as swiftly as possible. Otherwise, I evaluate the risks of its infection as extremely high. Let us hurry, Rogue Trader."

traits.locale_text: “没有时间可浪费了。必须尽快清除盘踞在此地的腐化。否则，据我评估，感染扩散的风险极高。我们必须尽快行动，行商浪人。”

languages.text: "Wir dürfen keine Zeit verlieren. Die Verderbnis, die sich an diesem Ort eingenistet hat, muss so schnell wie möglich gereinigt werden. Andernfalls bewerte ich das Risiko einer Infektion als extrem hoch. Sputen wir uns, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}."
languages.original_text: "There is no time to lose. The corruption that has nested in this place must be sanitised as swiftly as possible. Otherwise, I evaluate the risks of its infection as extremely high. Let us hurry, Rogue Trader."

traits.locale_text: "Wir dürfen keine Zeit verlieren. Die Verderbnis, die sich an diesem Ort eingenistet hat, muss so schnell wie möglich gereinigt werden. Andernfalls bewerte ich das Risiko einer Infektion als extrem hoch. Sputen wir uns, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}."

languages.text: « Il n'y a pas une minute à perdre. La corruption qui s'est nichée dans cet endroit doit être assainie dans les plus brefs délais. Dans le cas contraire, j'évalue les risques de contamination comme étant extrêmement élevés. Hâtons-nous, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. »
languages.original_text: "There is no time to lose. The corruption that has nested in this place must be sanitised as swiftly as possible. Otherwise, I evaluate the risks of its infection as extremely high. Let us hurry, Rogue Trader."

traits.locale_text: « Il n'y a pas une minute à perdre. La corruption qui s'est nichée dans cet endroit doit être assainie dans les plus brefs délais. Dans le cas contraire, j'évalue les risques de contamination comme étant extrêmement élevés. Hâtons-nous, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. »

languages.text: "Kaybedecek zaman yok. Burada yuvalanan yozluk, mümkün olan en kısa sürede temizlenmeli. Aksi takdirde bulaşma riskinin son derece yüksek olduğunu değerlendiriyorum. Acele edelim Hür Tacir."
languages.original_text: "There is no time to lose. The corruption that has nested in this place must be sanitised as swiftly as possible. Otherwise, I evaluate the risks of its infection as extremely high. Let us hurry, Rogue Trader."

traits.locale_text: "Kaybedecek zaman yok. Burada yuvalanan yozluk, mümkün olan en kısa sürede temizlenmeli. Aksi takdirde bulaşma riskinin son derece yüksek olduğunu değerlendiriyorum. Acele edelim Hür Tacir."

languages.text: 「時間はない。この場所に巣食う腐敗を可能な限り速く浄化しなければ。そうでなければ、感染の危険性を極めて高いと評価する。急げ、ローグトレーダー。」
languages.original_text: "There is no time to lose. The corruption that has nested in this place must be sanitised as swiftly as possible. Otherwise, I evaluate the risks of its infection as extremely high. Let us hurry, Rogue Trader."

traits.locale_text: 「時間はない。この場所に巣食う腐敗を可能な限り速く浄化しなければ。そうでなければ、感染の危険性を極めて高いと評価する。急げ、ローグトレーダー。」
